summary.notes: Compact spell summaries in spells.json are convenience copy for search and detail previews, not exact SRD quotations.

effect.notes: Short effect snippets in spells.json are convenience copy and should not be treated as exact rules text.

summary.notes: Compact creature summaries in creatures.json are convenience copy for search and detail previews, not exact SRD quotations.

features.notes: Creature feature strings in creatures.json are condensed browse copy and are not exact stat-block text.

actions.notes: Creature action strings in creatures.json are condensed browse copy and are not exact stat-block text.
